summary: Receipt Settings Feature Testing Complete. All 7 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified: Receipt Settings button visible on POS page, dialog opens correctly with all UI elements (logo upload, store info inputs, footer fields, printer width/font size selects, toggle switches), live receipt preview updates in real-time, save functionality works with success toast.

issues: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> in tbody - known issue from visual editor wrapper, not blocking functionality
Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended but not blocking

backend_api.GET /api/receipt-settings: Returns default settings for new org, returns saved settings for existing org
backend_api.PUT /api/receipt-settings: Saves and returns updated settings, requires admin role
backend_api.POST /api/receipt-settings/logo: Uploads logo and returns data URI, validates file type and size (max 500KB)

frontend.receipt_button: POS page shows 'Receipt' button with Settings icon in daily summary card next to 'History' button
frontend.dialog_opens: Clicking Receipt button opens ReceiptSettingsDialog with data-testid='receipt-settings-dialog'
frontend.logo_section: Logo upload area with Upload/Remove buttons, 'Show logo on receipt' toggle
frontend.store_info_fields: Store Name, Store Name (Arabic), Address Line 1, Address Line 2, Phone, VAT Number inputs all present with correct data-testid attributes
frontend.footer_fields: Footer Message and Footer (Arabic) inputs present
frontend.printer_width_select: Dropdown with 58mm/72mm/80mm options, updates preview width in real-time
frontend.toggle_switches: Show VAT #, Show Barcode toggles present
frontend.live_preview: Receipt preview updates immediately when settings change (store name, footer, width tested)
frontend.save_functionality: Save Settings button persists to backend, success toast appears 'Receipt settings saved'

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Receipt Settings features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Test receipt settings created and restored: store_name=Khayratna, printer_width=80mm
context_for_next_testing_agent: Receipt Settings feature fully tested and working. Backend API handles GET/PUT/POST/DELETE for receipt settings and logo. Frontend dialog (ReceiptSettingsDialog.jsx) opens from POS page Receipt button, all UI elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing. Live preview updates in real-time when settings change. Settings persist correctly to MongoDB receipt_settings collection. The printThermalReceipt function in POSPage.jsx uses receiptSettings state to customize receipt HTML output.
